daily.today_energy: Mercury's got your back today, Virgo. You're feeling that clarity energy—like someone just turned up the brightness on your perception. Trust the little nudges telling you to reorganize something, whether that's your space or your headspace.
daily.love: If you're coupled up, your person might appreciate you actually saying the vulnerable stuff you've been thinking. Single? Someone's noticing your grounded energy. Don't overthink the signs—just be your authentic self.
daily.career: Your attention to detail is genuinely your superpower rn. That project you thought was messy? You can untangle it. Leadership vibes are present; people trust your judgment. Speak up in meetings if something's been on your mind.
daily.health: Your body's asking for intentional movement today—nothing extreme, just something that feels good. Hydration matters more than you think. Your nervous system benefits from a few minutes of stillness, maybe some journaling or breathing space.

weekly.overview: This week's cosmic energy is inviting you to slow down and actually listen to what your intuition's been trying to tell you. Mercury's moving favorably, so clarity is coming—trust the whispers.
weekly.love: Whether you're coupled up or flying solo, this is peak energy for authentic connections. Stop performing and let people see the real you. The right ones will stay, and that's the whole point.
weekly.career: Your work momentum is building quietly. Small wins matter more than you think right now. Stay focused on what you can control and watch how opportunities align when you're not forcing things.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for presence over perfection. Move in ways that feel good, nourish yourself without guilt, and create space for rest. Energy follows intention—set yours toward feeling genuinely better.
